Video.summary: Director Ti West hosts a thrilling lineup of genre-bending horror, action-packed adventures, mysteries, and more!
Video.grandparentTitle: Chills and Thrills with Ti West
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH celebrates Alfred Hitchcock and the masterful storytelling that still keeps audiences on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director John Landis joins Trailers from Hell to talk 'Battle for the Planet of the Apes' and more.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy

Image.alt: The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy
The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy
The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy

Video.summary: Looking back at the iconic films of horror director George A. Romero.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: John Phillip Law and Lee Van Cleef aren’t friends, but they’ll find they have something in common when they both set out to hunt down a gang of vicious outlaws in the Wild West. Directed by Giulio Petroni, this 1967 Spaghetti Western features a musical score by the legendary Ennio Morricone.
Video.title: Death Rides a Horse

Video.summary: John Landis returns to Trailers from Hell to talk 'Citizen Kane' and more classic movies.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Image.alt: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Video.summary: Two masters of horror bring your nightmares to the big screen in this spine-chilling collection.
Video.grandparentTitle: Terror Titans: The Films of Wes Craven and John Carpenter
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A legend in the exploitation genre, these are the films that define director Jack Hill's career.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante celebrates the noir classics that explore themes of identity, paranoia, and duality.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Eli Roth presents a wild ride through cult horror, shocking exploitation, and vintage sci-fi.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In space, only the people sitting next to you can hear you scream. So scream loud!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Enter the minds of the twisted geniuses who gave birth to monstrous creations and big screen horrors.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 1: Monstrous Minds
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Carrie to Eraserhead and beyond, Stephen King and David Lynch have defined cinematic storytelling for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stephen King Stories and Decoding David Lynch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: While “The Raven” may fly high, others less fortunate are subject to a “Premature Burial” inside “The Tomb of Ligeia”
Video.title: Corman, Price and Poe

Video.summary: Frank Sinatra was nominated for an Academy Award for Best Actor for his portrayal of Frankie Machine, a former drug addict struggling with sobriety after he’s released from prison. Though Frankie dreams of a music career, he finds himself caught up in a web of lies, betrayal, and murder that could eventually lead to his downfall. Based on the novel by Nelson Algren, The Man With the Golden Arm was added to the National Film Registry by the Library of Congress in 2020.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Man with the Golden Arm
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a high-octane ride through director Jonathan Kaplan's world of renegades, road warriors, and the rough edges of the 1970s.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hard Turns and Hard Times: The Films of Jonathan Kaplan
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When it comes to comedy TFH creator Joe Dante has a soft spot for lovable oddballs, accidental heroes, and big-hearted dreamers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Joe Dante’s Classic Monster Madness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These are the early hits that made Steven Spielberg the biggest name in blockbuster movies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a closer look at the classic films of William Friedkin, Brian De Palma, and John Carpenter.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Three directors. Three unique styles. Three incredible legacies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a look at the bizarre body horror and sci-fi films of director David Cronenberg.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: No kids, we are not in Narnia. Let’s go to the “Little Shop of Horrors” and have a drink with “The Wild Angels.”
Video.title: The Chronicles of Corman

Video.summary: When “Boxcar Bertha” and “Bloody Mama” took a trip to “Hollywood Boulevard,” they told some car thieves to “Eat My Dust,” and drove off like they were extras in “Death Race 2000.”
Video.title: The Corman Cinematic Universe

Video.summary: Director and storyteller Mick Garris shares his personal film favorites and the stories behind them.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Ernest Dickerson talks epic filmmaking and the eternal struggles of cinema's greatest characters.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From spine-chilling thrills to edge-of-your-seat suspense, filmmaker Katt Shea talks her favorite films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Giant monsters are on the rampage! Who will save us?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Atomic scientists unknowingly awaken the colossal prehistoric turtle Gamera, whose titanic rampage threatens to destroy humanity.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Science fiction dominated cinema screens in the 1980s, and these are the ones we'll always remember.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A doctor experimenting with transplant techniques keeps his girlfriend's head alive when she is decapitated in a car crash, then goes hunting for a new body.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Legendary director Joe Dante discusses his favorite films.
Video.title: Joe Dante: Fearless Leaders Film Favorites

Image.alt: Joe Dante: Fearless Leaders Film Favorites
Joe Dante: Fearless Leaders Film Favorites
Joe Dante: Fearless Leaders Film Favorites

Video.summary: From 'Bonnie and Clyde' to 'Duck Soup,' filmmaker John Landis talks his favorite film trailers.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Crime, Carnage & Curiosity

The Land of Landis: Crime, Carnage & Curiosity
The Land of Landis: Crime, Carnage & Curiosity

Video.summary: Aliens and Androids have taken a “Fantastic Voyage” to Earth, and now we are all in “Altered States!”
Video.title: Aliens, Androids & Alternate Futures Vol. 1

Video.summary: “Invaders from Mars” have landed, hired ‘Robocop,” and are all now driving cross-country with “Speed Racer”
Video.title: Aliens, Androids & Alternate Futures Vol. 2
